query: SELECT 'sourceUrl' as col, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='product_master' AND COLUMN_NAME='sourceUrl' UNION ALL SELECT 'deletedAt', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='brand_livestreams' AND COLUMN_NAME='deletedAt' UNION ALL SELECT 'bw_linked_accounts', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME='bw_linked_accounts' UNION ALL SELECT 'bwCustomerId', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='bw_linked_accounts' AND COLUMN_NAME='bwCustomerId';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT 'sourceUrl' as col, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='product_master' AND COLUMN_NAME='sourceUrl' UNION ALL SELECT 'deletedAt', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='brand_livestreams' AND COLUMN_NAME='deletedAt' UNION ALL SELECT 'bw_linked_accounts', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME='bw_linked_accounts' UNION ALL SELECT 'bwCustomerId', COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='bw_linked_accounts' AND COLUMN_NAME='bwCustomerId';
